assessment_objectives.objective: the cadence to periodically assess disclosed purposes for which Personal Data (PD) is collected, received, processed, stored, transmitted and/or shared is defined.
reasonable consumer expectations for disclosed purposes for which Personal Data (PD) is collected, received, processed, stored, transmitted and/or shared is identified.

disclosed purposes for which Personal Data (PD) is collected, received, processed, stored, transmitted and/or shared are periodically assessed to ensure compatibility with reasonable consumer expectations.
